action.reasoning: Observation: RTX 5090 (compute capability 12.0) is incompatible with PyTorch 2.7.1+cu118, causing 'no kernel image' CUDA error. Network is disabled so can't install newer PyTorch. Analysis: Must fall back to CPU training. DLinear is lightweight (~140K params) so CPU training is feasible. Decision: Modify train.py to force CPU, train for 20 epochs to get a solid baseline, and submit eval.
